subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Thy revered father dedicated his days to the pathway of God, devoting his nights and days to service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق حضرت پدر ایام خویش را وقف سبیل الهی کرد و شب و روز بخدمت پرداخت
subcodes.subjects: @the power of example, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
